scenario_description: User asks agent to add a signoff with a name. Agent writes it but the name is wrong. User corrects.

command:
printf 'Internal Memo

To: All Department Heads
From: Executive Office
Date: March 20, 2025

Subject: Q2 Planning Meeting

Please prepare your department Q2 plans by April 1, 2025.
The planning meeting will be held on April 5, 2025.
' > /home/user/Desktop/memo.txt

DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Add 'Regards, the CEO' at the end of the memo
Please change that to 'Regards, David Chen, CEO'. I need the actual name there, not just the title.
And add 'CC: HR Department, Finance Department' on the next line after the regards. Save.
